creator: okazaki@be.to
text:
In the message <200010270151.e9R1p7n15170@misha.privatelabs.com> 
Mikhail Teterin <mi@privatelabs.com> wrote:

> >Description:

> 	Convert True Type Fonts to PostScript Type 1 -- usable for
> 	printing and under X11. See http://sourceforge.net/projects/ttf2pt1/
> 	for more information.

> echo x - ttf2pt1/pkg-plist
> Xbin/t1asm

PREFIX/bin/t1asm conflicts with t1asm installed by print/t1utils, doesn't it?

-- 
Tetsurou
